# Ocean City PAT Testing

> Professional PAT testing across Plymouth, Devon and South East Cornwall. Landlord, holiday let, business and charity testing with same-day certificates. Phone 07783 543958.

## Pages

- [PAT Testing Plymouth | Landlord & Business | Ocean City](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/): Professional PAT testing in Plymouth, Devon & SE Cornwall — landlord, holiday let & business appliance testing, same-day certificate.
- [PAT Testing Services | Ocean City PAT Testing](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/services): Our PAT testing services for landlords, holiday lets, businesses and community groups across Plymouth, Devon and South East Cornwall. Same-day certificates.
- [PAT Testing Services in Plymouth | Ocean City PAT Testing](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/services/pat-testing): Portable appliance testing for homes and businesses — visual inspection plus a full electrical test, certified the same day.
- [Landlord PAT Testing in Plymouth | Ocean City PAT Testing](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/services/landlord-pat-testing): Keep your rental properties compliant and your tenants safe — fixed price per property, certified the same day.
- [Holiday Let & Airbnb PAT Testing | Ocean City PAT Testing](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/services/holiday-let-pat-testing): Protect your guests, your reviews and your insurance — PAT testing for cottages, Airbnbs and serviced lets across the South West.
- [Business & Commercial PAT Testing | Ocean City PAT Testing](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/services/business-pat-testing): Offices, shops, salons, cafés, gyms and workshops — tested with same-day certification and an asset register, around your opening hours.
- [Charity & Community Group PAT Testing | Ocean City](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/services/charity-community-pat-testing): Churches, village halls, clubs, pre-schools and community projects — our lowest rate at just 90p per appliance.
- [PAT Testing Prices Plymouth | From £35 | Ocean City](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/pricing): Fixed PAT testing prices: landlords from £35 per property, holiday lets from £80, businesses from £80, charities 90p per item. Same-day certificate. Free quote.
- [Areas Covered | PAT Testing Plymouth, Devon & Cornwall](https://www.oceancitypattesting.co.uk/areas-covered): PAT testing across Plymouth, the South Hams & South East Cornwall — Saltash, Torpoint, Tavistock, Liskeard, Salcombe and more. Same-day certificates.
